description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The back is finished in a matte metallic blue with a prominent silver Apple logo centered near the upper half. The rear top left corner houses a raised triple camera array with three large lenses and a flash, all set within a square module. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible seams and a slight protrusion for the camera bump. The device is thin and compact, typical of high-end mobile phones, and appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, with precise detailing and a premium finish.
description: A sleek, blue metallic smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a centered Apple logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the edge-to-edge glass display with a dark, abstract wallpaper and a small notch at the top.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the device's slimness and the slight protrusion of the rear camera bump.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte blue finish, centered silver Apple logo, and triple camera array in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side profile highlighting the flat metallic edge and the camera bump's extension from the back.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, visually prominent against the matte blue finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a dark, abstract wallpaper with blue light gradients and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses and a flash are arranged in a triangular pattern within a square module at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the sides, likely including a power button and volume rockers, but specific details are not visible in the images.
